# genesyscloud_knowledge_document (Data Source)

Data source for Genesys Cloud Knowledge Document. Select a knowledge document by title and optionally by category name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "genesyscloud_knowledge_document" "example_document" {
  title               = "Example Document"
  knowledge_base_name = genesyscloud_knowledge_knowledgebase.example_base.name
  category_name       = "Example Category"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `knowledge_base_name` (String) Knowledge base name
- `title` (String) Knowledge document title

### Optional

- `category_name` (String) The name of the category to filter the knowledge document by. This is useful when multiple documents share the same title.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
